positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial forest scene rendered in deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and ethereal gold accents. The composition features a central silhouette of stylized trees and swirling cosmic mist, interconnected by glowing geometric linework and bioluminescent flora. Focus on strong, crisp outlines and negative space. The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and Japanese Ukiyo-e nature motifs. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for symmetrical repeat printing on fabric. Cinematic lighting, maximalist detail, vector illustration quality, flat color wash, high contrast, graphic novel style.
negative: blur, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, noise, text, signature, watermark, ugly, poorly drawn, cartoon, photorealistic, grainy, smudge, logo, symbol, trademark
